package repository

import "context"

// RolesRepository is a draft repository boundary for roles.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type RolesRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query RolesQuery) ([]Role, error)
}

type RolesQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
